title: Towering Golems
description: The Towering Golem Mod makes golems build up to match your height.
body:
The Towering Golems Mod makes iron golems build up blocks when you try to kill them, so you can’t get the usual height advantage. They’ll just keep building to match you. Even when the golem is passive and you simply walk by, it will still build up three blocks. When you attack, the golem will quickly build up to your level to strike back, making combat much trickier and way more fun. 
The mod flips the usual roles, as players normally build up three blocks to attack a golem, but now the golem turns the tables, building up to hit the player instead.
